arts.ttl: New Injury Concern for Lazio at the Back Ahead of Lecce Trip
arts.sum: Lazio have received an injury boost as Alessio Romagnoli returned to training, but at the same time, Patric was forced to stop. The Perfect Storm Marco Baroni had a nightmarish scenario at the Stadio Olimpico on Monday, with his backline getting gradually depleted during the Serie A clash against Inter Milan.
